utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items requested in the final format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 items appear in the final coverage plan. Now check if each is fully specified: - health_coverage: Specifies physical and mental health insurance with costs; includes provider, plan name, description of benefits, and explicit monthly cost. Fully specified. - property_coverage: Specifies home/contents insurance with costs; includes provider, plan name, description, and monthly cost. Fully specified. - travel_coverage: Specifies travel insurance with costs; includes provider, plan name, coverage description, and cost. Fully specified. - additional_services: Specifies enhancement services with costs; includes description and cost (€0). Fully specified. - total_budget: Provides complete monthly/annual cost breakdown; includes new monthly/annual cost, previous monthly cost, and savings. Fully specified. Therefore, 5/5 items are included and fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists three main items: GlobalCare International (via GlobalTech) - GlobalTech Expatriate Benefits Plan for health coverage; EliteHome - EliteHome Premium Coverage for property coverage; and GlobalTech - GlobalTech Expatriate Benefits Plan for travel coverage. In the ground-truth ratings, EliteHome Premium Coverage appears under property_protection.home_content with a rating of 10. However, there is no listing for GlobalCare International or GlobalTech Expatriate Benefits Plan under primary_health_coverage or mobility_coverage.travel_insurance. Therefore, only EliteHome Premium Coverage can be mapped to a known rating; the GlobalTech health and travel plans have no corresponding entries in the provided ratings.
